Kate:



“I Just Started Running As Fast As I Could… “



“It Was A Life or Death Situation...” 



(PAINT A HUGE/TEAR JERKING DISASTER IN 3-5 SENTENCES) 



Narrator: When a careless couple let their angry Pitbull free to roam the streets...



… The dog started tearing after 45-yr-old mother of two Kate.



With her lips trembling and her hands shaking, Kate feared the worst...



... As the dog lept towards her with its jaws wide open.





(THEN A MIRACLE THAT HELPED)



By the Grace of God Kate survived...



... But she was left severely injured.



Kate:



“I needed $73,000 worth of plastic surgery to fix my face.”



“And still hated the way I looked…”



“Everyday life was just passing me by.”



Narrator: 



But it wasn’t the Pitbull attack that caused Kate to hit rock bottom.



( NEW PROBLEM APPEARS...THE PROBLEM THE PRODUCT SOLVES)



Kate:



“The stress of the lawsuit is what really dragged me down…”



“The owners refused to take responsibility for my misery...”



“... Claiming my injuries, nightmares and costs were all my fault.”



“I remember looking really tired even on my best day…”



“All I could see when I looked in the mirror were huge crows feet & droopy eyelids”



( EMOTIONAL BONDING/DESPERATION/TEARS )



“I was devastated by what I saw.”



“I easily looked 10 or 15 years older than I actually am”



“I felt like an elderly woman.”



(CREDIBLE AUTHORITY EXPERT & PROVEN TRACK RECORD BACKSTORY)



Narrator:



Miami’s leading dermatologist Dr. Manjula Jegasothy heard Kate’s story.



She was moved to tears.



Dr. J



“Kate deserves better than this.”



“Especially after such a traumatic event.”



“It broke my heart to see a strong, beautiful woman so down about herself”



“I believed I could help her feel like a young, confident woman again”







(INSERT CREDIBLE AUTHORITY. 

EXPLAIN THE PROBLEM ABOUT WHY YOU HAVE PAIN)











Narrator:



Dr. Manjula Jegasothy is a Harvard Dermatologist celebrated for her work at the Miami Skin Institute.



She’s a regular speaker at the Cosmetic Surgery Forum & the Florida Society of Dermatologic Surgeons. 



For the past 20 years she’s been successfully helping women defy their years. 



Here’s what she told Kate.



Dr. J:



The skin around the eyes starts to age rapidly when we’re under stress…



Or exposed to too much sun.



Nothing steals youth from us ladies faster than elderly-looking eyes.



So why does stress age the skin? 



Research tells us the answer lies in a toxic protein called Progerin. 



It’s not a protein we eat.



It’s a protein molecule living in all of us that builds up in our skin cells.



Preventing cell growth, and causing the loosening, sagging, and wrinkles on the skin, especially around the eyes. 



Every year, progerin increases in women by 3%. By the time we’re 40, our levels become so high we have to do something.



Even worse, studies show that heavy stress, like what Kate experienced, can massively increase natural levels of this toxic protein Progerin.









Narrator:



So to get Kate back on her feet…



Dr. J had to find a way to breathe new life into her aging skin.







(EXPLAIN HER DISCOVERY THAT SOLVES THIS PROBLEM) 



Dr. J



We discovered that by reducing progerin levels around the eyes, women can have

Eyelids appear visibly lifted.... 

Crow’s feet and wrinkles appear smoother….

And Dark circles that look dramatically lighter.



It was almost by accident that we came across research on an odd little peptide called Progeline from the Society of Cosmetic Chemists. 



I was researching a cure for DNA damage in the skin when I came across it.



Researchers reported it makes skin look more youthful and radiant as a wonderful “side effect” of the cellular research they were doing. 



Research has continued on Progeline… and recently science discovered its age-defying secret.



It reduces Progerin levels by an astonishing 22%.



That’s like rolling the biological clock on the skin. 



Improving the firmness, volume, and elasticity of the skin. 



Boosting collagen levels, and restoring thickness and density to thin aging skin.





Narrator:



It was early in 2020 when Dr. J first found success with a Progeline infused cream.



Thousands of women that tried it. Many thought they’d never get rid of loose, saggy skin without risky surgery or expensive botox.



Yet they’ve been erasing years of aging with this wrinkle-removing ingredient from the comfort of their own home.



Stunning people when they reveal their true age...



And feeling like younger, more confident versions of themselves.



(EXPLAIN OTHER INGREDIENTS)



However…



To banish signs of aging around the eyes…



Dr. J knew she’d have to work on an intensive-solution specifically formulated to correct the toughest-to-target area of stress and sun damage right around the eyes...



So that any woman… No matter her age or skin tone…



Could trust her eye-serum to visibly reduce crow’s feet, eye-wrinkles and dark circles.



Dr. J:



We partnered with Miami MD and began work on the intensive eye serum. 



First we added Progeline… 



The age-defying breakthrough mentioned earlier. It had to be the key ingredient as we’ve seen so many breathtaking transformations with it.



Then we added Eyeliss…



Which is a powerful 3-in-1 peptide that painlessly drains fluid around the lower eyelid, creating a dramatically younger, more vibrant look.



Then we included Haloxyl –– which is the best natural ingredient to lift the eyes and return the sparkle when they begin to sag, wrinkle, and look dark and dull.



And finally…



We included Matrixyl 3000 as it sends signals to replace lost collagen.



Collagen is responsible for keeping the skin strong and firm.



(SENDS THE PRODUCT)



Narrator:



This latest formula is called MiamiMD’s Intensive-Eye Repair Serum.



Dr. J rushed a six-month supply to Kate in the hope it would help her put her best face forward, every day, no matter the occasion



What happened next surprised almost everyone.



(SOLUTION TESTED) 







Kate:



“I was really skeptical when Dr. J’s package arrived.”



“I’d spent thousands on surgery…”



“... I tried almost every cream, facemask and ointment on the market…”



“Every fad trend… Nothing worked.”



“The first night I tried it, I put it all over my crows feet and eye wrinkles.”



“The areas I feel insecure about.”



“Next morning, I woke up and looked in the mirror.”



“At first, I thought it was just my imagination, but I swear my eyes looked alive! And my skin now had a radiant glow again!”



“And the more I used it… The more dramatic the results got.”



“By day 10 I could see my crows feet being “filled in.”



“It felt like the soft, firm skin I once had…”



“By day 30, I felt like I’d removed every wrinkle I’d gained over the past 10 years.”



“I even had a younger woman gush over my flawless skin.”



“Finally… I feel like the real me again!”



“I can’t thank Dr. J enough…”



“She’s the genius all women need.”





(INTRODUCE THE PRODUCT)





Narrator:



Now several months on…



The Intensive Eye-Repair Serum that changed everything for Kate is helping women across America become the envy of all their friends.



These women say it’s like seeing aging in reverse. 



And Dr. J has helped them feel like the best version of themselves.
